inputs.srepr: Mul(Integer(3), Symbol('p0', positive=True, real=True), Add(Integer(1), Mul(Integer(-1), Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True, real=True), Integer(-2)), Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)))))

output.srepr: Mul(Rational(8, 5), pi, Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True, real=True), Integer(3)), Symbol('p0', positive=True, real=True))

method: integrate 4*pi*r^2*S_trace from 0 to R for parabolic pressure profile
scope: parabolic pressure profile p=p0(1-r^2/R^2), not derived from hydrostatic equilibrium
